metadata.project: Dancing Goat - Industry Expert & Endorsement Content Model
metadata.scope: Enhancement to existing content model - adds 2 new reusable content types

requirements.projectDescription: Dancing Goat is a high-end coffee and coffee accessories online retailer with an existing Xperience by Kentico content model. We need to add 2 new reusable content types: Industry Expert and Endorsement.

contentTypes.name: IndustryExpert
contentTypes.description: A person recognized in coffee enthusiast communities with a valued opinion on coffee-related products and services.

fields.name: IndustryExpertName
fields.caption: Name
fields.description: Full name of the industry expert.

fields.name: IndustryExpertTitle
fields.caption: Title
fields.description: Professional title or role (e.g., Master Barista, Coffee Critic, Head Roaster).

fields.name: IndustryExpertPhoto
fields.caption: Photo
fields.description: Profile photo of the expert. Uses the existing DancingGoat.Image content type.

fields.name: IndustryExpertBio
fields.caption: Biography
fields.description: Short biography describing the expert's background and credentials in the coffee world.

fields.name: IndustryExpertWebsiteUrl
fields.caption: Website URL
fields.description: Personal website or primary social media profile URL.

contentTypes.name: Endorsement
contentTypes.description: An endorsement of a coffee product or accessory from a specific Industry Expert, suitable for display on product landing pages, in Page Builder widgets, and in marketing emails.

fields.name: EndorsementExpert
fields.caption: Industry Expert
fields.description: The industry expert providing this endorsement.

fields.name: EndorsementProduct
fields.caption: Endorsed Product
fields.description: The product being endorsed. Any existing Dancing Goat product content type is valid.

fields.name: EndorsementQuote
fields.caption: Endorsement Quote
fields.description: The expert's endorsement statement or quote about the product. Keep concise for widget and email display.

fields.name: EndorsementRating
fields.caption: Rating
fields.description: Optional star rating from 1 to 5 given by the expert.

fields.name: EndorsementDate
fields.caption: Endorsement Date
fields.description: Date the endorsement was given or published.

contentTypes.name: ProductPage
contentTypes.description: Existing page content type for product detail pages. Endorsements are displayed programmatically on these pages.

contentTypes.name: LandingPage
contentTypes.description: Existing landing page content type with Page Builder support. Endorsement widgets will be added to pages using this type.

relationships.description: Many endorsements can be given by one industry expert. Each endorsement references exactly one expert.
Endorsements can reference a coffee product (DancingGoat.ProductCoffee).
Endorsements can reference a grinder product (DancingGoat.ProductGrinder).
Endorsements can reference a brewer product (DancingGoat.ProductBrewer).
Endorsements can reference an accessory product (DancingGoat.ProductAccessory).
Endorsements can reference a product using the alpha-size template (DancingGoat.ProductTemplateAlphaSize).
Industry experts reference an existing DancingGoat.Image content item for their profile photo.
Existing product pages programmatically query and display endorsements for the featured product at runtime (no direct field link on the page type).
Landing pages display endorsements via future Page Builder widgets that select Endorsement reusable content items.

pageBuilder.note: Page Builder widgets for Endorsement display are planned but not in scope for this content modeling phase. Future implementation will add widget(s) that allow editors to select and display Endorsement items on LandingPage content types.

templates.name: LandingPageTemplate
templates.description: Existing Landing Page template. Future Endorsement widgets will be placed on pages using this template.
